channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
item.description: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate, whose social media empire promoting wealth, male dominance and misogyny has made them among the world’s most polarizing internet personalities, were arrested Saturday in Miami as British authorities sought their extradition on rape and sex trafficking charges. The brothers were taken into custody by the U.S. Marshals Service on [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
item.description: British prosecutors announced Saturday that they were seeking the brothers’ extradition on charges alleging they raped and trafficked women between 2010 and 2017.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 18
item.description: Hillsborough deputy shot in face and hand speaks, Sarasota police investigate reported shooting at high school, and more rain ahead.

[FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Practice Makes Takeoff: Tampa airport event helps families with autism prepare for air travel
item.description: For many families of children and adults with autism or other intellectual disabilities, flying can be intimidating long before takeoff.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Reported gunshots at high school in Sarasota leads to investigation: SPD
item.description: Sarasota police are looking into reports of gunshots heard at Booker High School's parking lot on Saturday afternoon.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Second deputy leaves hospital, recovering from home after Ruskin ambush: HCSO
item.description: Both Hillsborough County deputies have been released from the hospital, after they were injured in an ambush shooting in Ruskin on Thursday.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Gunshots reported July 18 in Booker High parking lot, the latest

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Deputy shot in the face during Ruskin shootout leaves hospital: HCSO
item.description: A deputy who was left hospitalized after taking gunfire to the face earlier this week during a shootout in Ruskin is headed home.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Development chances increase for tropical disturbance in Gulf
item.description: Forecasters are monitoring Invest 91L in the Eastern Gulf, which now has a higher chance of developing over the next few days.
